tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Formatting, module verification, vet, unit, race, reproducible build, process smoke, and repository checks passed.

tests.name: race detector
tests.summary: Concurrent optimistic transitions and all package tests completed without a reported race.

tests.name: active fuzzing
tests.summary: No crash or invariant violation was found in the bounded active fuzz runs.

tests.name: process-level kernel smoke
tests.summary: A fresh daemon became ready, the CLI created and inspected a run, and SIGTERM completed graceful shutdown.
